emails.subject: Reminder
emails.body: Reminder Shirley, Please, send it to the entire group. Vince **************** This is another reminder about the responsibility we have as a group for cleaning the conference rooms after meetings. For many visitors to Enron a conference room maybe the first and the last exposure to the company. Last Thursday, some members of the group left, leaving behind their lunch boxes on the table. Please, don't embarrass me by having to point out to you that your mothers don't work here. Vince

emails.body: Reminder Hello everyone: Vince has asked me to send the following as a reminder: **************** This is another reminder about the responsibility we have as a group for cleaning the conference rooms after meetings. For many visitors to Enron a conference room maybe the first and the last exposure to the company. Last Thursday, some members of the group left, leaving behind their lunch boxes on the table. Please, don't embarrass me by having to point out to you that your mothers don't work here. Vince
